final_reasoning: The street view shows a mix of Arabic and French text on shop signs, which is characteristic of North African countries, specifically Tunisia. Vegetation includes palm trees, typical of a Mediterranean/arid climate. The road layout and the style of the utility poles are consistent with Tunisian urban areas. A specific shop sign 'FOUED AUTO' and other Arabic text suggest a local commercial street. Based on the visual cues and the specific combination of yellow taxis and bilingual signage, this is located in Tunisia.
